nasb.text: So Hanun took David’s servants and shaved them and cut off their garments in the middle as far as their hips, and sent them away.

esv.text: So Hanun took David’s servants and shaved them and cut off their garments in the middle, at their hips, and sent them away;

cnv.text: 於是，哈嫩拿住大衛的臣僕，剃去他們的鬍鬚，又把他們的衣服，從臀部以下割去半截，然後才放他們走。

ccb.text: 哈嫩便把大卫的臣仆抓起来，剃去他们一半胡子，割去他们下身的衣服，然后放走他们。
